use_cases: Displaying primary, default, dashed, text, and link button variants in a flex container
Providing standard action triggers for forms and UI interactions
Showing Ant Design button component styles for UI library demos
Creating button collections with different visual hierarchy levels
Demonstrating button component options for React applications
ai_summary: Ant Design Button component showcasing multiple button variants including primary, default, dashed, text, and link types. Renders in a responsive flex container with gap spacing. A foundational UI component from the Ant Design React library used across enterprise applications for standardizing button interactions and visual hierarchy.
